Lvl30.Name: Play Arcana
Lvl30.Desc:
At the start of your turn, grant a single ally of your choosing within 10 squares Major Arcana and a barrier of 1 HP.
After attaining level 40, this barrier increases to 2 HP.

Lvl30.Name: Major Arcana
Lvl30.Desc: While a character is under the effect of Major Arcana, they may reroll a single die of their choosing when determining the amount of damage dealt by an ability. Any die rerolled in this way cannot be rerolled again, and its result must be used. Major Arcana is removed when its effect is resolved or at the end of the character's turn.

Lvl30.Name: Repose
Lvl30.DirectHit: Removes all markers generated by the target.

Lvl30.Name: Helios
Lvl30.Range: A 5x5 area centered on this character

Lvl30.Name: Ascend
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Removes Knocked Out from the target, then restores 1d6 + 2 HP, grants Transcendent, and afflicts them with Weakness. *This ability can also target a character outside the encounter map. When doing so, move the target to an empty square within range after resolving the ability's effects.

Lvl30.Name: Combust
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Inflicts a DOT(3) on the target.

Lvl30.Name: Lightspeed
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Immediately use one of your magic abilities.

Lvl30.Name: Esuna
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Removes a single enfeeblement of the target's choosing.

Lvl30.Name: Lucid Dreaming
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Recover an additional 1 MP at the end of this round's [Adventurer Step].

Lvl30.Name: Swiftcast
Lvl30.Trigger: When any character ends their turn
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Immediately use one of your magic abilities.

Lvl30.Name: Essential Dignity
Lvl30.Trigger: When any character ends their turn
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Restores 1d6 HP to the target. If the target's HP is less than or equal to half of their Max HP (rounded up), restores 2d6 + 2 HP instead.
